pull.title: chore(ci): Fix typo in Dockerfile comment
pull.body:
Corrects the spelling of "dpkg-dev" in a comment within the Dockerfile.

The comment explains the reason for installing the `dpkg-dev` package..

repo.name: secp256k1
repo.description: Optimized C library for EC operations on curve secp256k1
